name: player_successful_rushing_and_receiving_play_percentage_from_plays range year_offset pools numerator/denominator
description: Successful rushing/receiving play % is a percentage: a range year_offset must pool SUM(successful plays)/SUM(rush+target plays) across the window and scale by 100, not SUM the per-season percentages. Converted from a raw with_select_string column to has_numerator_denominator + is_percentage.
expected_query: with "t1167c049cc5e34c386eaf6136ab13b79" as materialized (select COALESCE(bc_pid, trg_pid) as pid, SUM(CASE WHEN successful_play = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as successful_rushing_and_receiving_play_pct_from_plays_numerator, SUM(CASE WHEN bc_pid IS NOT NULL OR trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as successful_rushing_and_receiving_play_pct_from_plays_denominator from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024, 2025) group by COALESCE(bc_pid, trg_pid)) select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, (SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(t1167c049cc5e34c386eaf6136ab13b79.successful_rushing_and_receiving_play_pct_from_plays_numerator) / NULLIF(SUM(t1167c049cc5e34c386eaf6136ab13b79.successful_rushing_and_receiving_play_pct_from_plays_denominator), 0), 2) FROM t1167c049cc5e34c386eaf6136ab13b79 WHERE t1167c049cc5e34c386eaf6136ab13b79.pid = player.pid) AS "successful_rushing_and_receiving_play_pct_from_plays_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
